hero.tagline.desc: Architectural engineer who writes code for AEC — from Stockholm’s hospitals and airports to digital twin work in Tokyo.
home.featured.title: Featured Project
home.featured.project.title: Shinjuku Indoor Navigation
home.featured.project.desc: Revit models of the buildings surrounding Shinjuku Station — Lumine 1, Lumine EST, NEWoMan, Busta, and Yodobashi East and West — plus the station's connection points for indoor navigation. Output goes two places: FBX for the Unity-based navigation app, and CityGML/3D Tiles for public release under PLATEAU, Japan's national 3D city model.
home.tools.title: Tools I've Built
home.tools.desc: Plugins and converters that move BIM data into the formats that downstream platforms actually expect.
